case_title: VERNON FRISON VS. MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: DISMISSED W/O PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 2/16/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF FRISON, VERNON AS TO DEFENDANT MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FRISON, VERNON ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-28-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,384.00 FILED BY FRISON, VERNON AS TO DEFENDANT MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-10-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY JENNIFER DOLIN, VP OF OPERATIONS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
